_comment: Manual overrides applied on top of generated verb data. Edit here — run apply_overrides.py to patch verbs.full.js. These survive data regeneration.

être._reason: Lemmatizer failed to aggregate est/sont/était/sera etc. — real frequency is #1 in French

devoir._reason: Mistranslated as 'to duty' (noun confusion). Modal verb.

pouvoir._reason: Mistranslated as 'to power' (noun confusion). Modal verb.

croire._reason: Mistranslated as 'to think' — duplicates penser. Primary meaning is believe.

partir._reason: Mistranslated as 'to go' — duplicates aller. Partir = leave/depart.

attendre._reason: Mistranslated as 'to expect'. Primary meaning is wait (for).

rendre.translation: to give back; rendre + adj = make
rendre._reason: Mistranslated as 'to render'. Core uses: return sth, and causative construction.

tuer._reason: Inflated by subtitle corpus (crime/action). Not top-20 in real conversational French.

mourir._reason: Inflated by subtitle corpus. Not top-50 in general French.

appeler.translation: to call; s'appeler = to be named
appeler._reason: Add reflexive note — s'appeler is the most common use learners encounter first.

falloir._reason: Add structural note — always impersonal, learners are often confused by this.

savoir._reason: Distinguish from connaître. Savoir = know facts/skills.

connaître._reason: Distinguish from savoir. Connaître = be familiar with.
